title: Discovery
description: Clarify the product signal, audience, and premium positioning before any interface decisions are made.

title: Design Concept
description: Shape the visual language, motion rhythm, and layout hierarchy into a system that feels distinct.

title: Development
description: Translate the concept into responsive, maintainable, high-performance components and flows.

title: Launch
description: Polish the final details, validate quality, and prepare a deployment that feels production-ready on day one.
